documents.title: Synthetic measurement note
documents.text: This synthetic source records that Synthetic evidence synthesis method is evaluated with an explicit method, defined scope, and reproducible observations. The shared fictional metric is 10 units, which is intentionally included only to exercise contradiction handling in acceptance tests.

documents.title: Synthetic dataset documentation
documents.text: This synthetic dataset describes a separate collection method, a stated population, and transparent limitations for Synthetic evidence synthesis method. The shared fictional metric is 12 units, which intentionally conflicts with another reserved-domain fixture source.

documents.title: Synthetic analysis memorandum
documents.text: This independent synthetic memorandum compares the available fictional observations for Synthetic evidence synthesis method, identifies uncertainty, and recommends documenting unresolved differences before drawing conclusions from the evidence.
